title: Compliance: rust/lichen-link/link_layer.rs TOFU
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.6. File: rust/lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs. Status: COMPLIANT. First contact pins pubkey (line 407), subsequent contacts detect KeyChange (lines 382-391), unpin_peer() for rotation (lines 271-273). Tests verify behavior (lines 610-684).
